name: 216Labs Admin
tagline: At 216Labs we are building the toolkit for production grade vibes.
description: At 216Labs we are building the toolkit for production grade vibes. Control plane: toggle deployments, manage env vars, and keep accountability across the monorepo.

env_vars.description: Optional. Overrides default LLM for /tv-studio (e.g. google/gemini-2.0-flash-001 on OpenRouter, gpt-4o-mini on OpenAI).
